untranslatable_reason: Head and Shoulders Bottom requires detection of three distinct shoulders/head pivot points and a down-sloping neckline over ~2 weeks. Current indicators cannot reliably identify: (1) left shoulder low formation, (2) head (lower low) formation, (3) right shoulder low (higher than head but lower than left), and (4) neckline slope/trendline dynamics. Pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis and trendline geometry beyond point-in-time indicator values. Approximated with: breakout above Donchian upper + volume confirmation + price positioning, but this lacks the critical multi-pivot structural validation.
